reviews.review_description: my kid ware playing and it said a bad word
The is the best thing I have found
That one would require yet a third login for this service is unacceptable. Immediate uninstall after the 'trial' that is in no way explained.
Eh
It is pretty fun can you do a update and make the game free please i dont have moneys
Wow, we design jewelry and we were able to load our cad files directly into campfire , went to sign up for the enterprise version, well worth the $1500 a year.

The app on the quest 3 is good. But the app on PC is good as well but you are limited to what file types you can use. I was hoping to try it out on one of my cad drawings at my work before dishing out the hefty subscription fee. This should have been included in the description in the store. Also there is no tutorial showing how to get your work from PC to the quest 3 . If you try to export brings you to the subscription window. So for me would have loved to use it at it's full potential before dishing out the cash for the monthly fee...

developer_response.body: Steve, we’re sorry you’re having difficulty and are happy to help. To get your models on Quest 3, you add them from the PC, Mac, or iPad. All models are stored securely in the cloud and are accessible from all devices automatically. This allows you to collaborate with others in meetings or offline. The export feature in the enterprise plan is for exporting models to another tool and isn’t required for adding models or collaborating.

reviews.review_description: I love this game and it’s free but the quest two it’s super weird because it black-and-white that’s the only thing I don’t like
Easy to set up

Looks good from the tutorial but unfortunately can't create an account - something wrong with the password acceptance.
edit: looks like this is fixed - must have just been a service down.

One comment - the free/trial account is almost useless with the project size and I can't see people stumping up the cost to test their CAD files - needs to be a way for potential customers to try out a "real" file.

developer_response.body:
Many thanks for the feedback. We agree 100% and are working on a new subscription plan to meet this need. If you're willing to chat about your needs, please contact us at
support@campfire3d.com. We'd love your input and are happy to provide a free trial of the current enterprise plan to get you going.

reviews.review_description:
Used code from Quest 2 on website to create an account, stuck at password entry.
Nothing I type can get me to next screen and or create the account.
Please advise

developer_response.body:
Apologies for the frustration. Our passwords were not allowing some special characters, but have been fixed. Give it a another try or or email us at support@campfire3d.com
and we'll schedule some 1:1 onboarding.

reviews.review_description: I'm not understanding how to make an account. I got this game just because I wanted to be able to create cool stuff. But when it asked me to make an account and I couldn't figure it out. I did some research and now I'm under the impression. You have to be the owner of a business could someone please help me.

developer_response.body: Stephen, we’re sorry you’re having difficulty and are happy to help!  You can create an account at campfire3d.com by clicking the “Get Started” button. You can also email us at  support@campfire3d.com to schedule a 1:1 onboarding session and we’ll walk you through it.

reviews.review_description: This is the best Q3 app When using passthrough
After Demo finished, I can't log in even if the password is correct. Should I purchase it?

developer_response.body:
Apologies for the frustration. Our passwords were not allowing some special characters, but have been fixed. Give it a another try or or email us at support@campfire3d.com
and we'll schedule some 1:1 onboarding

reviews.review_description:
If you enjoy Apps for 3D visualization of Industrial Design or CAD models, I have something to recommend.
It is called CAMPFIRE 3D. Available for free on Meta Quest 2 and 3.
You will feel like Tony Stark interacting with the models and with the AI with a good sense of humor.
I loved the electric car Honda-e that comes as a sample model.
Enjoy...

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We're super excited that Campfire made you feel like Tony Stark - minus the Iron Man suit, of course. Keep enjoying, and remember, with great power comes great responsibility!

reviews.review_description: 5 out of 5
This is a great software for exploring and experiment on the things you can do. I am defo recommending it to my friends that have a vr

reviews.review_title: Really good for cooperation on a project
reviews.review_description: I just wish that you could add things right from a menu in the app. Like small objects.
How do we create a project on iPad and can you make more examples from spark but anyway this app is great I will recommend it to my family and friends thank you

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words, and we’re glad you’re enjoying Spark! To create a project, download the PC or Mac app from campfire3d.com and add your 3D models. If you open the Quest app at the same time, you’ll also see how live collaboration works!

reviews.review_description: CAD 3D VR Design Collaboration App! 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟 The user interface is incredibly intuitive, making it a breeze to navigate and use. The onboarding process is engaging and ensures you are up to speed in no time. The product is sleek and efficient, streamlining the entire design collaboration process. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a top-notch design tool!
